info.name: notification-service
info.description:
REST API for sending notifications, retrieving delivery status, and querying delivery attempts.

Base URL: {{notification_service_url}} (default: http://localhost:8001)

request.description:
Retrieves the overall delivery status for a notification event.

Currently returns a placeholder response. For detailed per-channel status, query the delivery-tracker service directly.

Response (200):
```json
{
  "eventId": "evt-001-20250101",
  "overallStatus": "UNKNOWN",
  "message": "Event has been processed. Query delivery-tracker service for detailed status."
}
```

Returns a placeholder message with instructions to query the delivery-tracker service directly.

Response (200):
```json
{
  "eventId": "evt-001-20250101",
  "message": "Query delivery-tracker service at http://localhost:8003/api/v1/delivery-attempts/events/evt-001-20250101"
}
```
